ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "char_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "primary_attribute" INTEGER /* Primary attribute of the character (str, agi, int) */,
  "attack_type" INTEGER /* Attack type of the character (melee, ranged) */,
  "movement_speed" REAL /* Movement speed of the character */,
  "base_health" INTEGER /* Base health of the character */,
  "armor" INTEGER /* Armor value of the character */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage value of the character */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character (carry, support, offlane) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_attack_type FOREIGN KEY ("attack_type") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_primary_attribute FOREIGN KEY ("primary_attribute") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (str, agi, int) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of attribute (primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_values" (
  "attribute_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute value */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that this attribute value belongs to */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute that this value belongs to */,
  "attribute_value" REAL /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_values_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_values_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_types" (
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack type */,
  "attack_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack type (melee, ranged) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attack type */,
  "attack_type_category" TEXT /* Category of attack type (physical, magical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that has this ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ability */,
  "cooldown" REAL /* Cooldown time of the ability */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abilities_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ability_levels" (
  "ability_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability level */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability that this level belongs to */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the ability */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage value of the ability at this level */,
  "cooldown" REAL /* Cooldown time of the ability at this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ability_levels_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (attribute, ability) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_updates_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the game version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game version */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Patch notes for the game version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that this statistic belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game version that this statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (win rate, pick rate) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (game development, analytics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, edit) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table that was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_synergies" (
  "synergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synergy */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that this synergy belongs to */,
  "synergy_char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that this synergy is with */,
  "synergy_type" TEXT /* Type of synergy (buff, debuff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_synergies_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_synergies_synergy_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("synergy_char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_counters" (
  "counter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counter */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that this counter belongs to */,
  "counter_char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character that this counter is against */,
  "counter_type" TEXT /* Type of counter (hard counter, soft counter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_counters_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_counters_counter_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("counter_char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)
